headline: 3 Reasons Investors Love Monster (MNST)
summary: Monster has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 14.5%. The stock now trades at $75.54, marking a 19.2% gain. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Monster Beverage Stock: Is MNST Underperforming the Consumer Staples Sector?
summary: Monster Beverage has underperformed its sector peers recently, yet analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: 5 Dividend Stocks Are 60% of Berkshire Hathaway After Buffett’s Q4 Selling Spree
summary: If any investor has stood the test of time, it’s Warren Buffett, and with good reason. For 60 years, the “Oracle of Omaha” had a rock-star-like presence in the investing world, and his annual Berkshire Hathaway shareholders meeting drew thousands of loyal investors.
